title: uHomes
description: The home plugin you've always wanted.
body:
µHomes is a fairly simple yet complexly configurable home plugin.

# Showcase
![a home icon in gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/045e723189f476651e039269c765ba4345df7eb8.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/W67JceI2sLs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features
- Both GUI & Command support (/home /sethome)
- Home limit permission
- Manage other's homes (Admin Feature) *WIP*
- Home icons, created & last teleported dates
- Claim protection (Lands, GriefPrevention)
- Fully customizable

# Placeholders
`%uhomes_home_count%` - returns number of homes the player has

`%uhomes_home_limit%` - returns number of homes the player can save

# Feature Request
If you have any feature requests, please let me know by creating a issue on github.

## Join Our Discord

For **support**, **updates**, and **community discussion**, join our Discord:  
[![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1194192078360555601?color=7289da&label=Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=white)![UDE discord invite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82a83d534b9cf23e42f612e6c571fbd0e890a218.png)](https://discord.gg/VV4bQEdGAd)
